name: Tuna Spread
recipeIngredient: 6 1/2 ounces Canned Tuna packed in water
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned tuna and chop it fine.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
Note: This recipe yields 1 cup, which is equivalent to 1 lean meat serving portion of 1/4 cup. The calorie count for each serving is approximately 48 calories.
